title: Stereocaryum symingtonianum
taxonomy: Stereocaryum symingtonianum belongs to the plant family Dipterocarpaceae. It is a species of tree that is native to the Western Ghats in India. The classification of Stereocaryum symingtonianum includes its classification as a species within the genus Stereocaryum. This genus is closely related to other Dipterocarpaceae species, such as those within the genus Dipterocarpus. The classification of Stereocaryum symingtonianum is still being studied and refined by botanists.
